headline: ASEAN Chair 2025 Yields 12 Deals But Myanmar Stalls
context: Malaysia ASEAN chairmanship produced 12 agreements but failed to advance Five-Point Consensus on Myanmar.

cards.big: ASEAN chair produced 12 agreements but Myanmar crisis remains stalled
cards.sub: Chairmanship credited for trade deals but criticized on Myanmar failure

cards.big: 12 agreements covered digital economy trade facilitation and climate
cards.sub: ASEAN Digital Economy Framework worth estimated USD2 trillion by 2030

cards.big: Myanmar military junta boycotted 4 of 6 ministerial meetings
cards.sub: Five-Point Consensus remains unimplemented 4 years after April 2021 adoption

cards.big: Malaysia hosted 2,800 meetings across 320 events during chair year
cards.sub: Government spent RM480 million on ASEAN events highest chair budget ever

cards.big: ASEAN chair tests whether regional leadership can achieve results beyond economic agreements
12 ASEAN deals signed but Myanmar stalls — consensus diplomacy reaches its limits on human rights crises.
